input.title: Cannot login after password reset
input.body: After resetting my password, I can no longer log into my account. I receive an 'Invalid credentials' message every time.

expected.summary: Users cannot log in after resetting their password.

input.title: Add dark mode support
input.body: It would be great if the application supported dark mode. Many users work late at night and prefer a darker interface.

expected.summary: Users requested a dark mode option for the application.

input.title: README installation instructions are outdated
input.body: The README still tells users to install Python 3.9, but the project now requires Python 3.11. Following the current instructions causes installation failures.

expected.summary: The installation guide needs updating for the current Python version.

input.title: Dashboard loads very slowly
input.body: The analytics dashboard takes around 30 seconds to load after login. Other pages load normally.

expected.summary: The analytics dashboard experiences excessive loading times.

input.title: User creation API returns HTTP 500
input.body: Sending a POST request to /users with valid data returns HTTP 500. The issue started after the latest deployment.

expected.summary: The user creation endpoint fails with an internal server error.
